cases.title: Ulanqab Central City Water Supply Project
cases.description: Building a long-distance water supply lifeline for the central urban area of Ulanqab, using high-standard 3PE anti-corrosion steel pipes to ensure safe and stable urban water supply.
cases.overview: The Ulanqab Central City Water Supply Project is a comprehensive public welfare project covering multiple stages including water transmission, lifting, storage, and purification. The project's water transmission line has a total length of about 120 kilometers, aiming to build a stable and reliable urban water supply system, meet the growing urban water demand, and modernize the city's water infrastructure.
cases.solution: The core pipelines of this project use advanced 3PE anti-corrosion steel pipe technology, ensuring excellent anti-corrosion performance and long-term operational stability for long-distance water transmission pipelines in complex environments. Combined with high-efficiency booster pump stations and intelligent storage facilities, it guarantees the efficient and safe delivery of water resources from the source to the end-user.
cases.results: After its successful operation, the project has significantly improved the water supply security capacity and water quality standards of Ulanqab's central urban area, providing safe and high-quality drinking water for local residents. Its efficient and stable operation mode has also provided solid water conservancy support for regional economic and social development, becoming a model for urban waterworks construction.

cases.title: Jinan Yuwei River Pipe Network Reconstruction Project
cases.description: Reconstruction of the Yuwei River basin pipe network in Jinan's central urban area, using TPFP anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes to improve the urban water environment quality.
cases.overview: The Yuwei River basin pipe network reconstruction project in Jinan's central urban area is a key project to improve the urban water environment and enhance sewage collection efficiency. This project uses TPFP anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes, strictly following the SY/T5037-2018 standard for production and acceptance. It aims to solve problems such as infiltration and mixed flows in old pipe networks and ensure the ecological health of the river.
cases.solution: The project selected TPFP anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes that comply with the SY/T5037-2018 standard. This pipe material, with its excellent anti-corrosion performance and reliable structural strength, ensures the long-term stable operation of the underground pipe network under complex soil and hydrological conditions. The strict production and acceptance process guarantees product quality from the source, providing a solid foundation for the smooth implementation of the project.
cases.results: The reconstruction project has effectively improved the sewage collection and transmission efficiency of the Yuwei River basin, significantly improved the river's water quality, and played a positive role in the ecological civilization construction of Jinan City. The project achieved the expected results, providing valuable experience for similar urban river pipe network reconstruction projects, with significant social and environmental benefits.

cases.title: CREC-7 Maonan Water Ecology and Sewage Treatment Project
cases.description: The Maonan water ecology and sewage treatment project by China Railway Seventh Group (CREC-7), using D820*10 anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin anti-corrosion to enhance sewage transmission efficiency.
cases.overview: The water ecology and sewage treatment project by CREC-7's Maonan branch aims to enhance the regional sewage treatment and transmission capacity and improve the water ecological environment. This project uses D820*10 anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes with a pipeline length of about 1800 meters, forming an important part of the water ecology treatment system.
cases.solution: The key to the project lies in the anti-corrosion treatment of the pipes. The inner wall is treated with epoxy resin anti-corrosion, and the outer wall with 3PE anti-corrosion, forming a double-layer protection that effectively resists sewage corrosion and external environmental erosion. This composite anti-corrosion technology ensures that the pipeline maintains excellent corrosion resistance and structural integrity during long-term operation, even when facing complex sewage media.
cases.results: The successful laying and operation of the pipeline system have significantly improved the sewage collection and transmission efficiency in the Maonan area, laying a solid foundation for the stable operation of subsequent sewage treatment plants. This project has played an important role in improving regional water environment quality and promoting water ecological balance, contributing to the green development of the Maonan area.

cases.title: Weihai High-Pressure Natural Gas Pipeline Project
cases.description: Weihai City's high-pressure natural gas pipeline project, using DN700*10 national standard spiral welded pipes with reinforced 3PE anti-corrosion, ensuring the safety of urban natural gas supply.
cases.overview: The Weihai City high-pressure natural gas pipeline project is an important part of the city's energy infrastructure construction, aiming to build a safe and efficient natural gas transmission network. The project uses DN700*10 national standard spiral welded pipes with a designed pipeline pressure of 10.0MPa, which is of strategic significance for ensuring residential and industrial gas use in Weihai City.
cases.solution: Considering the stringent requirements for high-pressure natural gas transmission, this project's pipeline process uses reinforced 3PE anti-corrosion, with a coating thickness of 3.5mm, far exceeding industry standards, providing ultimate anti-corrosion protection. The steel pipe material and welding process strictly follow national standards, ensuring the safety and reliability of the pipeline in high-pressure environments and effectively extending its service life.
cases.results: The successful construction of this high-pressure natural gas pipeline has greatly improved the stability and reliability of Weihai's natural gas supply, meeting the energy needs of the city's rapid development. The smooth operation of the project provides a solid energy guarantee for the popularization of clean energy and economic and social development in Weihai, with significant social and economic benefits.

cases.title: Pengyang County Water-Saving Supplementary Irrigation Project
cases.description: Pengyang County's water-saving supplementary irrigation project, using D1620*14 anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin powder and external reinforced 3PE anti-corrosion, promoting efficient agricultural water use.
cases.overview: The Pengyang County water-saving supplementary irrigation project is a key water conservancy facility for local agricultural development, aiming to improve farmland irrigation efficiency and achieve sustainable use of water resources. This project uses D1620*14 anti-corrosion spiral welded pipes with a pipeline length of over 11,000 meters, and is a key project for promoting agricultural production and income growth.
cases.solution: To address the complex water quality of agricultural irrigation and soil corrosivity, this project's pipeline adopts a dual internal and external anti-corrosion strategy: the internal anti-corrosion is epoxy resin powder, which effectively resists the erosion of the transported water; the external anti-corrosion is reinforced 3PE, providing excellent protection in complex soil environments. This combined anti-corrosion ensures the stability and durability of the pipeline in long-term operation.
cases.results: The completion of the water-saving supplementary irrigation project has significantly improved the agricultural irrigation conditions in Pengyang County, increased the efficiency of water resource utilization, and effectively promoted crop yield and farmers' income growth. The successful implementation of the project has laid a solid foundation for the modernization of local agriculture and demonstrated the great potential of water-saving irrigation technology in arid and semi-arid regions.

cases.title: Jiaozhou Bay Subsea Natural Gas Pipeline Laying Project
cases.description: The Jiaozhou Bay subsea natural gas pipeline laying project, using DN600-DN1000 international standard spiral welded pipes with reinforced three-layer polyethylene external anti-corrosion, securing the subsea energy artery.
cases.overview: The Jiaozhou Bay subsea natural gas pipeline laying project is a key energy infrastructure project in Shandong Province, aiming to build a subsea natural gas transmission artery across Jiaozhou Bay. The project involves a total pipeline length of 12 kilometers, using DN600-DN1000 international standard spiral welded pipes, featuring high difficulty and technical requirements.
cases.solution: Facing the complex subsea environment and strict anti-corrosion requirements, the project's external pipe anti-corrosion adopted the internationally leading reinforced three-layer polyethylene (3PE) process, and strictly followed international standards for the production of spiral welded pipes. This high-level anti-corrosion coating, combined with excellent pipe body quality, ensures the pipeline's ultra-long service life and safety reliability under harsh subsea conditions such as high salinity, high pressure, and low temperatures.
cases.results: The successful laying of the Jiaozhou Bay subsea natural gas pipeline filled the gap in regional subsea natural gas transmission, greatly enhancing the clean energy supply capacity and energy security level of Qingdao and surrounding areas. As a model of high-difficulty marine engineering, its smooth operation demonstrates the excellent capabilities of advanced anti-corrosion technology and project implementation.

cases.title: Jiangsu Coastal Gas Pipeline Huaian-Jianhu-Yancheng Section Project
cases.description: The Jiangsu coastal gas pipeline Huaian-Jianhu-Yancheng section project, using D219*8 and other specifications of anti-corrosion seamless pipes, securing the coastal energy corridor.
cases.overview: The Jiangsu coastal gas pipeline Huaian-Jianhu-Yancheng section project is an important part of the national long-distance natural gas pipeline network, aiming to build an efficient energy transmission channel in the coastal area. The project pipeline length is about 2500 meters, using D219*8 and other specifications of anti-corrosion seamless pipes, which is of great significance for ensuring the energy supply in East China.
cases.solution: Considering the special climatic conditions of the coastal area, which is hot, humid, and has high salt fog, the project's external pipe anti-corrosion uses a reinforced 3PE coating and strictly follows the GB/T23257-2009 standard, ensuring excellent corrosion resistance in complex environments. The selection of seamless steel pipes further enhances the overall strength and safety of the pipeline, effectively preventing leaks and ensuring the reliability of natural gas transmission.
cases.results: The successful construction of this gas pipeline has optimized the natural gas supply pattern in the Jiangsu coastal area, enhanced regional energy security capacity, and provided solid clean energy support for local economic and social development. The smooth commissioning of the project marks another solid step in the construction of national energy infrastructure, demonstrating the important application of advanced anti-corrosion technology in long-distance pipeline projects.

cases.title: Inner Mongolia Alashan Yellow River National Wetland Park Phase II Construction
cases.description: Phase II of the Inner Mongolia Alashan Yellow River National Wetland Park, using D325*9 and other specifications of 3PE anti-corrosion seamless steel pipes to assist in wetland ecological restoration and water circulation.
cases.overview: The Phase II construction project of the Inner Mongolia Alashan Yellow River National Wetland Park is an important part of the Yellow River ecological barrier construction, aiming to restore and enhance wetland ecological functions through water system connectivity and ecological restoration. The project uses D325*9 and other specifications of 3PE anti-corrosion seamless steel pipes with a pipeline length of about 4200 meters, which is a key link in ensuring wetland water circulation.
cases.solution: Targeting the unique ecological environment and water quality characteristics of the wetland park, this project selected 3PE anti-corrosion seamless steel pipes with excellent anti-corrosion performance on both inner and outer walls. The integrity and high strength of the seamless steel pipes ensure stable operation in the complex geological conditions of the wetland. The efficient anti-corrosion coating effectively prevents water erosion of the pipeline, ensures water quality safety, and minimizes the impact on the wetland's ecological environment.
cases.results: The implementation of the project has effectively improved the ecological environment of the Alashan Yellow River National Wetland Park, restored the wetland function in some areas, and enhanced biodiversity. The pipeline system provides a stable guarantee for ecological water replenishment and water circulation in the wetland, making important contributions to local ecological civilization construction and sustainable development, and has received high praise from environmental protection departments.

cases.title: Nanzhang Development Avenue Medium-High Pressure Pipeline Project
cases.description: The Nanzhang Development Avenue medium-high pressure pipeline project, using D165*4 and other high-specification anti-corrosion straight-seam welded pipes to ensure urban energy supply.
cases.overview: The Nanzhang Development Avenue medium-high pressure pipeline project is an important upgrade to the city's gas infrastructure, aiming to enhance the natural gas transmission capacity and coverage of Nanzhang County. The project uses D165*4 and other high-specification anti-corrosion straight-seam welded pipes with a pipeline length of about 6000 meters, which is of great significance for ensuring the city's energy security.
cases.solution: To ensure the long-term safe operation of the medium-high pressure gas pipeline, this project's pipeline follows the GB/T23257-2018 standard and uses a 3PE anti-corrosion process, providing excellent corrosion resistance. The precise manufacturing and strict quality control of the straight-seam welded pipes ensure dimensional accuracy and welding quality, thus maintaining excellent structural integrity and operational reliability even under high-pressure transmission conditions.
cases.results: The completion and operation of this medium-high pressure pipeline have significantly improved Nanzhang County's natural gas supply security capacity, optimized the urban energy structure, and provided more stable and clean energy for residential and industrial users. The successful implementation of the project has promoted the modernization of Nanzhang County's infrastructure and injected new vitality into local economic and social development.

cases.title: Zhangjiakou City Tap Water Intake Pipeline Project
cases.description: Zhangjiakou City's tap water intake pipeline project, using D820*7 spiral steel pipes with internal epoxy powder and external polyethylene anti-corrosion, ensuring the safety of urban drinking water.
cases.overview: The Zhangjiakou City tap water intake pipeline project aims to provide a safe and stable source of drinking water for the city. This project uses D820*7 spiral steel pipes with a pipeline length of about 3000 meters. The laying of the pipeline is of crucial significance for ensuring the daily water needs of Zhangjiakou residents.
cases.solution: Considering the dual high requirements for anti-corrosion performance and safety and hygiene of water transmission pipelines, this project's internal pipe anti-corrosion uses an epoxy resin powder coating, which effectively prevents water erosion of the pipeline and ensures the hygiene and safety of drinking water. The external anti-corrosion uses polyethylene powder, providing excellent corrosion resistance and mechanical protection, fully complying with the SY/T5037-2018 standard.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this intake pipeline project has significantly improved Zhangjiakou's water supply capacity and water quality assurance level, effectively solving the water shortage problems in some urban areas. The smooth operation of the project provides a solid water resource guarantee for the city's sustainable development and has received good social feedback.

cases.title: Henan Yanjin County No. 1 Sewage Treatment Plant Pipe Network Renewal and Reclaimed Water Reuse Project
cases.description: Pipe network renewal and reclaimed water reuse at the Yanjin County Sewage Treatment Plant in Henan, using epoxy resin powder/polyethylene coating to enhance water resource recycling.
cases.overview: The pipe network renewal and reclaimed water reuse project at the No. 1 Sewage Treatment Plant in Yanjin County, Henan, aims to enhance sewage treatment capacity and promote the recycling of reclaimed water. This project uses 1420*10 spiral welded pipes with a pipeline length of about 1800 meters. The project is of great significance for improving the local water environment and achieving efficient use of water resources.
cases.solution: The project pipeline strictly follows the SY/T5037-2018 standard. The internal anti-corrosion uses an epoxy resin powder coating to effectively resist the corrosion of sewage media; the external anti-corrosion uses a polyethylene powder coating to enhance the pipeline's corrosion resistance and mechanical protection capabilities. The double-layer anti-corrosion design ensures the long-term stable operation of the pipeline in a complex sewage environment.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this project has effectively improved the sewage collection and treatment efficiency in Yanjin County, significantly improved the water quality of the river, and promoted the recycling of reclaimed water resources, opening up a new path for the sustainable development of regional water resources. The project has achieved good environmental and social benefits.

cases.title: Anshan Drainage Co., Ltd. Drainage Pipe Network Laying Project
cases.description: Laying of the Anshan drainage pipe network, using 1220*8 spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin powder and external polyethylene anti-corrosion, with a coating thickness >1.2mm.
cases.overview: The drainage pipe network laying project by Anshan Drainage Co., Ltd. aims to optimize the city's drainage system and improve the efficiency of sewage collection and transmission. This project uses 1220*8 spiral welded pipes with a pipeline length of 950 meters. The smooth progress of the project is crucial for ensuring the normal operation of the city and improving the living environment.
cases.solution: This project's pipeline strictly follows the SY/T5037-2018 standard, and both internal and external anti-corrosion use advanced processes: the internal anti-corrosion is epoxy resin powder, and the external anti-corrosion is polyethylene powder, with the external coating thickness greater than 1.2mm, providing ultimate corrosion and wear resistance. This high-standard anti-corrosion ensures the reliability of the pipeline during long-term transmission of complex drainage media.
cases.results: The successful laying of the drainage pipe network has significantly improved Anshan's drainage capacity, effectively alleviating the risk of urban waterlogging and improving the level of municipal infrastructure. The completion and operation of the project provide a solid drainage guarantee for the city's sustainable development and has been widely recognized by the owner and citizens.

cases.title: Yinhanjiwei Nanyang North Slope Urban and Rural Water Supply Project
cases.description: The Yinhanjiwei Nanyang North Slope urban and rural water supply project, using 1020*10 spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin powder and external polyethylene reinforced anti-corrosion to ensure water supply safety.
cases.overview: As a national strategic water resource allocation project, the Yinhanjiwei project's Nanyang North Slope urban and rural water supply project is an important branch line. The project uses 1020*10 spiral welded pipes, with an internal anti-corrosion epoxy resin powder coating thickness of no less than 0.4mm, and an external reinforced polyethylene coating. It aims to provide a stable and reliable source of high-quality water for urban and rural residents.
cases.solution: Considering the vital importance of safety and durability for the main pipeline of a water diversion project, this project uses high-standard anti-corrosion technology. The internal anti-corrosion is an epoxy resin powder coating (thickness no less than 0.4mm) to ensure that the water quality is not secondarily polluted; the external anti-corrosion is a reinforced polyethylene coating, providing excellent mechanical protection and anti-corrosion performance, fully complying with the SY/T5037-2018 standard.
cases.results: The successful completion of the Nanyang North Slope urban and rural water supply project has effectively solved the local water shortage problem and greatly improved the drinking water conditions for urban and rural residents. As a model project of the Yinhanjiwei project, its successful operation provides valuable experience for subsequent similar projects and has produced huge social and economic benefits.

cases.title: Hami City Yushugou Flood Resource Utilization Project
cases.description: Hami City's Yushugou flood resource utilization project, using D529*8 spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin powder and external polyethylene reinforced anti-corrosion to achieve efficient use of floodwater.
cases.overview: The Hami City Yushugou flood resource utilization project aims to effectively collect, store, and utilize floodwater during the flood season, turning waste into a valuable resource to serve local agricultural irrigation and ecological water replenishment. The project uses D529*8 spiral welded pipes with a pipeline length of over 5000 meters and is an important water conservancy measure for the local area.
cases.solution: Considering that the transported medium may contain sediment and the environment is complex, this project's pipeline strictly follows the SY/T5037-2018 standard. The internal anti-corrosion uses epoxy resin powder (thickness no less than 0.35mm), and the external anti-corrosion uses a polyethylene coating (thickness no less than 1.2mm), providing dual high-strength anti-corrosion protection to ensure the long-term stability of the pipeline in complex water quality and buried environments.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this project has effectively improved the level of flood resource utilization in the Yushugou area of Hami City, reduced the risk of flood disasters, and provided a stable source of irrigation water for surrounding farmland, promoting agricultural production and income growth. The project has significant ecological and social benefits and provides a successful example for the comprehensive utilization of water resources in arid regions.

cases.title: A Certain Project of PowerChina Sinohydro Bureau 3 Co., Ltd.
cases.description: A project by PowerChina Sinohydro Bureau 3, using D820*10 spiral welded pipes with internal epoxy resin coating and external polyethylene powder coating, with high-standard anti-corrosion to ensure project quality.
cases.overview: This project, undertaken by PowerChina Sinohydro Bureau 3, is part of a key national infrastructure project aimed at enhancing the water conservancy or energy transmission capacity of a specific region. The project uses D820*10 spiral welded pipes with a total pipeline length of over 4000 meters. This project is of great strategic significance for ensuring national energy security or water resource allocation.
cases.solution: Considering the long-term operational needs and complex environment of the project, this project's pipeline adopts high-standard internal and external anti-corrosion measures: the internal anti-corrosion is an epoxy resin coating to effectively resist media corrosion; the external anti-corrosion is a polyethylene powder coating, providing excellent mechanical protection and anti-corrosion performance. Strict production and testing processes ensure the excellent quality of the pipeline and the smooth implementation of the project.
cases.results: The successful delivery and operation of the pipeline system provided a solid foundation for the smooth progress of this major project, ensuring the overall schedule and quality of the project. Its excellent anti-corrosion performance and reliability have effectively extended the service life of the project facilities and made positive contributions to the construction of national infrastructure.

cases.title: Anhui Jieshou City Urban-Rural Water Supply Integration Phase II Project
cases.description: Phase II of the Anhui Jieshou City urban-rural water supply integration project, using D1620*14 spiral steel pipes with external epoxy coal tar pitch (four oils, three cloths) anti-corrosion and internal IPN8710 non-toxic coating.
cases.overview: Phase II of the Anhui Jieshou City urban-rural water supply integration project is a key measure for the local area to improve its water supply service capacity and achieve the same network and quality for urban and rural water supply. This project uses D1620*14 and other specifications of spiral steel pipes with a pipeline length of about 8500 meters. It aims to build a safe, efficient, and environmentally friendly integrated urban-rural water supply network.
cases.solution: Given the importance of drinking water safety and long-term pipeline durability, this project adopted a composite anti-corrosion scheme: the inner wall is coated with IPN8710 non-toxic paint to ensure pure and pollution-free water quality; the outer wall uses epoxy coal tar pitch (four oils, three cloths) anti-corrosion to provide excellent corrosion resistance and effectively resist complex soil and environmental erosion. This dual internal and external anti-corrosion scheme ensures the long-term safe operation of the water supply pipeline.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this project has significantly improved the drinking water quality and supply reliability for urban and rural residents in Jieshou City, achieving the goal of urban-rural water supply integration. The smooth operation of the project provides a solid water resource guarantee for local economic and social development, enhances the quality of life for residents, and has received widespread praise.

cases.title: Shaanxi Yulin Yellow River East Line Mazhen Water Diversion Extension Project
cases.description: The Shaanxi Yulin Yellow River East Line Mazhen water diversion extension project, using D235B spiral pipes with internal IPN8710 non-toxic drinking water coating and external reinforced epoxy asphalt anti-corrosion to ensure water supply safety.
cases.overview: The Shaanxi Yulin Yellow River East Line Mazhen water diversion extension project aims to divert Yellow River water to the Mazhen area to solve local agricultural irrigation and some residential drinking water problems. The project uses D235B spiral pipes with a pipeline length of about 850 meters. This project is of great strategic significance for alleviating local water shortages.
cases.solution: Considering the special nature of transporting drinking water, this project's internal pipe anti-corrosion uses IPN8710 non-toxic drinking water coating to ensure water quality safety and no secondary pollution. The external anti-corrosion uses reinforced epoxy asphalt anti-corrosion to effectively resist the erosion of complex soil environments and ensure the integrity and reliability of the pipeline in long-term operation.
cases.results: The completion of this water diversion extension project has effectively improved the water supply situation in the Mazhen area of Yulin, provided a stable source of irrigation water for local agricultural production, and improved the drinking water conditions for some residents. The successful implementation of the project provides strong support for local economic and social development and ecological improvement.

cases.title: Kunming Water Supply Group Water Supply Project
cases.description: The Kunming Water Supply Group water supply project, using D2620*16 and other specifications of spiral welded pipes with two layers of internal IPN8710 non-toxic drinking water coating and external epoxy coal tar pitch (4 oils, 2 cloths) anti-corrosion, ensuring urban water supply safety.
cases.overview: The Kunming Water Supply Group Co., Ltd. water supply project is a key urban water supply infrastructure project in Kunming, aiming to meet the growing urban water demand. This project uses D2620*16 and other specifications of spiral welded pipes, with the steel pipes referencing the SY/T5037-2018 standard. The project is of great significance for enhancing the city's water supply security capacity.
cases.solution: Targeting the requirements for urban drinking water safety and long-life pipeline operation, this project's internal pipe anti-corrosion uses two layers of IPN8710 non-toxic drinking water coating to ensure pure and non-toxic water quality. The external anti-corrosion uses an epoxy coal tar pitch (4 oils, 2 cloths) process, providing excellent corrosion resistance and mechanical strength to effectively cope with complex underground environments. Strict implementation of industry standards ensures the high quality and reliability of the pipeline.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this water supply project has greatly improved Kunming's water supply capacity and water quality safety assurance, effectively solving the water supply pressure problems in some areas. The smooth operation of the project provides a solid water resource foundation for Kunming's economic development and residents' lives and has received high recognition from all sectors of society.

cases.title: Jiangsu Jingjiang Economic Development Zone Pipeline Drainage Project
cases.description: The Jiangsu Jingjiang Economic Development Zone pipeline drainage project, using DN150*4 and other specifications of plastic-coated straight-seam steel pipes and insulated pipes to ensure smooth drainage in the park.
cases.overview: The Jiangsu Jingjiang Economic Development Zone pipeline drainage project aims to optimize the park's drainage system and ensure the drainage needs of industrial production and urban residents. This project uses DN150*4 and other specifications of plastic-coated straight-seam steel pipes and plastic-coated straight-seam insulated pipes. The project is of great importance for improving the infrastructure level of the park.
cases.solution: This project selected internally and externally plastic-coated straight-seam steel pipes, combined with plastic-coated straight-seam insulated pipes, to ensure that the pipeline has both excellent anti-corrosion performance and stable transmission efficiency in complex underground environments and for media transport with potential temperature differences. The plastic coating process provides comprehensive protection for the inside and outside of the pipeline, effectively extending its service life.
cases.results: The successful construction of the pipeline drainage project has significantly improved the drainage capacity of the Jingjiang Economic Development Zone, effectively reduced the risk of waterlogging, and ensured the normal production and operation of the park. The smooth operation of the project provides solid drainage infrastructure support for the sustainable and healthy economic development of the park.

cases.title: Nanchang Qiheng Huicai Construction Service Co., Ltd. Project
cases.description: A project by Nanchang Qiheng Huicai Construction Service Co., Ltd., using D325*5.5 and other specifications of spiral welded pipes with internal and external epoxy resin powder anti-corrosion, with a coating thickness greater than 350 microns.
cases.overview: This project, undertaken by Nanchang Qiheng Huicai Construction Service Co., Ltd., is part of an urban infrastructure construction or large-scale building support project, aiming to provide high-quality pipeline transmission solutions. The project uses D325*5.5 and other specifications of spiral welded pipes, with both internal and external anti-corrosion using epoxy resin powder, and an external coating thickness greater than 350 microns.
cases.solution: This project's pipeline has both internal and external anti-corrosion using an epoxy resin powder coating, with the external coating thickness strictly controlled to be greater than 350 microns, providing excellent corrosion resistance, wear resistance, and adhesion. This high-standard internal and external anti-corrosion treatment ensures that the pipeline maintains excellent performance and reliability during long-term operation, even when facing complex media or soil environments.
cases.results: The successful delivery and application of the pipeline system effectively guaranteed the smooth progress of the project undertaken by Nanchang Qiheng Huicai Construction Service Co., Ltd., meeting its high standards for pipeline anti-corrosion and long service life. Its excellent anti-corrosion performance and reliability provided a solid guarantee for the overall quality and subsequent operation of the project.

cases.title: Dalian Museum Pipeline Engineering Project
cases.description: The Dalian Museum pipeline project, using D114-D630 plastic-coated spiral steel pipes with internal epoxy resin powder coating to ensure the safe operation of the museum.
cases.overview: The Dalian Museum pipeline project aims to provide high-standard pipeline solutions for the museum's water supply, drainage, fire protection, and other systems, ensuring the long-term safe operation of the cultural facility. The project uses D114-D630 plastic-coated spiral steel pipes with a total pipeline length of about 720 meters, and the internal epoxy resin powder coating is pink.
cases.solution: Considering the high requirements for pipeline safety and environmental protection in important public buildings like museums, this project uses internally and externally plastic-coated spiral steel pipes, with the inner coating being an epoxy resin powder specially designated as pink to meet design aesthetics and environmental protection needs. This coating not only has excellent anti-corrosion performance but also meets relevant hygiene standards, ensuring the purity of the transported media.
cases.results: The successful completion of the pipeline project has provided reliable pipeline system support for the various functions of the Dalian Museum, ensuring the safe and efficient transmission of media such as water, electricity, and gas. Its excellent anti-corrosion performance and customized coating color not only met the technical requirements of the project but also added a highlight to the overall design of the museum.

cases.title: Chongqing Haishi Trading Co., Ltd. Project
cases.description: A project by Chongqing Haishi Trading, using D219*4 straight-seam welded pipes with internal epoxy resin powder coating and an external coating thickness of 350 microns, meeting high-standard anti-corrosion requirements.
cases.overview: This project, undertaken by Chongqing Haishi Trading Co., Ltd., aims to provide customers with high-quality industrial anti-corrosion pipeline solutions. The project uses D219*4 straight-seam welded pipes, with the steel pipes following the GB/T3091-2015 standard, an internal epoxy resin powder coating, an external coating thickness of 350 microns with the coating following the GJ/T120-2016 standard, and a pipeline length of about 3200 meters.
cases.solution: This project's pipeline strictly follows national standards. The internal anti-corrosion uses an epoxy resin powder coating to ensure the anti-corrosion requirements during media transport. The external coating thickness is strictly controlled at 350 microns and follows the GJ/T120-2016 standard, providing excellent mechanical protection and weather resistance. This high-standard anti-corrosion strategy ensures the long-term reliable operation of the pipeline in complex industrial environments.
cases.results: The successful delivery and application of the pipeline products met the needs of Chongqing Haishi Trading Co., Ltd.'s customers for high-standard anti-corrosion pipelines, and their excellent performance was highly recognized by customers. This cooperation not only consolidated the cooperative relationship between the two parties but also laid a solid foundation for the company's market expansion in the field of industrial anti-corrosion pipelines.

cases.title: Shaanxi Longde Coal Mine Underground Water Supply and Drainage Pipeline Project
cases.description: The Shaanxi Longde Coal Mine underground water supply and drainage pipeline project, using D377 spiral steel pipes with loose flange connections for anti-corrosion, internally and externally coated with green epoxy resin plastic to ensure mine safety.
cases.overview: The Shaanxi Longde Coal Mine underground water supply and drainage pipeline project aims to provide a safe and reliable water supply and drainage system for the mine to ensure production safety. The project uses D377 spiral steel pipes with a total pipeline length of 2650 meters. Considering the special nature of the underground environment, there are extremely high requirements for the anti-corrosion performance and connection method of the pipeline.
cases.solution: To address the humid, highly corrosive, and impact-prone environment of the coal mine, this project's pipeline is coated with epoxy resin plastic on both the inside and outside. The coating color is green, which is not only visually conspicuous but also provides excellent corrosion and wear resistance. The connection method uses loose flange connections, which is convenient for underground installation and maintenance, ensuring the long-term stable operation of the pipeline system.
cases.results: The completion of this water supply and drainage pipeline project has effectively solved the underground water supply and drainage problems of the Longde Coal Mine and improved the mine's safety production assurance capacity. The excellent anti-corrosion performance and reliable connection method of the pipeline have reduced maintenance costs, extended the service life, and provided a solid guarantee for the continuous safe production of the coal mine.

cases.title: Guangxi Nanrong Industrial Park Medium-High Pressure Natural Gas Pipeline Project
cases.description: The Guangxi Nanrong Industrial Park medium-high pressure natural gas pipeline project, using D273*7 pipes with internal and external UV hot-melt epoxy resin powder coating to ensure safe and stable high-pressure transmission.
cases.overview: The Guangxi Nanrong Industrial Park medium-high pressure natural gas pipeline project is a key infrastructure for providing a stable and efficient natural gas supply to the park. The project uses D273*7 pipes with a total pipeline length of 22 km. This project is of great significance for ensuring the energy needs and sustainable development of the industrial park.
cases.solution: Considering the stringent requirements of medium-high pressure natural gas transmission, this project's pipeline uses a UV hot-melt epoxy resin powder coating for both internal and external anti-corrosion, with a coating thickness of no less than 400 microns. This advanced coating technology provides excellent corrosion resistance, high-temperature resistance, and wear resistance, ensuring the stability and safety of the pipeline during long-term high-pressure operation.
cases.results: The successful construction of this natural gas pipeline project has greatly enhanced the energy security capacity of the Guangxi Nanrong Industrial Park, meeting the production gas needs of enterprises within the park. The efficient and stable operation of the pipeline provides a solid energy foundation for the park's investment attraction and industrial development, achieving significant economic and social benefits.

cases.title: Ganzhou City Water Co., Ltd. Project
cases.description: A municipal drinking water pipeline project by Ganzhou City Water Co., Ltd., using D273 spiral steel pipes and D159 straight-seam welded pipes as base pipes, with internal and external epoxy resin plastic coating to ensure drinking water safety.
cases.overview: The Ganzhou City Water Co., Ltd. municipal drinking water pipeline project aims to upgrade the city's water supply network to a modern level and ensure the safety of residents' drinking water. The project uses D273 spiral steel pipes and D159 straight-seam welded pipes as base pipes, with a total usage of 1500 meters. The anti-corrosion method is internal and external epoxy resin plastic coating, and the pipe color is blue. This project is of great significance for upgrading urban water supply infrastructure.
cases.solution: Targeting the special requirements of municipal drinking water pipelines, this project's pipeline uses internal and external epoxy resin plastic coating for anti-corrosion, with the coating color customized to be blue. This not only ensures the hygienic safety of the water quality but also provides excellent corrosion and wear resistance. This dual internal and external protection effectively extends the service life of the pipeline and reduces maintenance costs.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this municipal drinking water pipeline project has significantly improved the quality and reliability of Ganzhou's water supply, providing safer and more hygienic drinking water for residents. The completion and operation of the project have laid a solid foundation for the sustainable development of the city's water supply system and have been widely praised by citizens.

cases.title: Ningbo Languang Engineering Construction Co., Ltd. Project
cases.description: A project for Ningbo Languang Engineering Construction Co., Ltd., purchasing multi-specification seamless steel pipes with internal and external double-layer epoxy powder plastic coating, with a supply period of 12 weeks, fast and efficient.
cases.overview: As the engineering contractor, Ningbo Languang Engineering Construction Co., Ltd. has strict requirements for the quality and delivery time of pipeline products. This project purchased multi-specification seamless steel pipes as base pipes, with a pipeline laying length of over 7300 meters, a supply period of 12 weeks, and passed a comprehensive acceptance inspection. It aims to provide high-standard anti-corrosion pipelines for a large-scale project.
cases.solution: To meet the customer's needs for high-standard anti-corrosion and rapid delivery, this project's pipeline uses a double-layer epoxy powder plastic coating on both the inside and outside, providing excellent corrosion resistance and mechanical strength. We strictly controlled the production process to ensure the high-quality completion and delivery of all products within the 12-week supply period, and successfully passed comprehensive acceptance tests.
cases.results: The success of this cooperation fully demonstrated our capabilities in anti-corrosion pipeline production and supply chain management, providing key support for the project of Ningbo Languang Engineering Construction Co., Ltd. The excellent performance and on-time delivery of the pipelines were highly recognized by the customer, laying a solid foundation for future cooperation.

cases.title: Gansu Tianshui Municipal Drinking Water Pipeline Anti-corrosion Project
cases.description: The Gansu Tianshui municipal drinking water pipeline anti-corrosion project, using D219 straight-seam steel pipes as base pipes with internal and external epoxy resin plastic coating to ensure drinking water safety.
cases.overview: The Gansu Tianshui municipal drinking water pipeline anti-corrosion project aims to upgrade and renovate the city's drinking water pipe network, enhance the anti-corrosion capacity of the pipelines, and ensure the safety of residents' drinking water. The project uses D219 straight-seam steel pipes as base pipes, with a pipeline laying length of over 1800 meters. The anti-corrosion method is internal and external epoxy resin plastic coating, and the pipe color is blue. This project is of great significance for urban infrastructure construction.
cases.solution: This project's pipeline uses high-performance epoxy resin plastic coating for both internal and external anti-corrosion, with the pipe color customized to be blue. This not only provides excellent corrosion resistance, effectively preventing water erosion of the pipeline, but also meets environmental and hygiene requirements. This comprehensive anti-corrosion protection ensures the long-term stable operation of the pipeline in complex underground environments and guarantees water quality safety.
cases.results: The successful implementation of this anti-corrosion project has significantly improved the anti-corrosion grade and service life of Tianshui's drinking water pipelines, effectively reduced the risk of pipeline leakage and pollution, and ensured the drinking water safety of urban residents. The completion of the project has set a model for the modernization of Tianshui's water supply system.

cases.title: Xinjiang Huashun Mining Co., Ltd. Project
cases.description: A project for Xinjiang Huashun Mining Co., Ltd., using D529*6 spiral anti-corrosion steel pipes with internal epoxy resin powder plastic coating, with both ends withstanding 64 kgf of pressure, for gas transportation.
cases.overview: The Xinjiang Huashun Mining Co., Ltd. project aims to build an efficient and safe mine gas transportation pipeline to ensure production safety and environmental protection needs in the mining area. The project uses D529*6 spiral anti-corrosion steel pipes, with both ends of the pipeline able to withstand 64 kgf of pressure. This pipeline is of great significance for mine gas extraction and utilization.
cases.solution: Targeting the high-pressure and complex media environment of mine gas transportation, this project's internal pipe wall uses an epoxy resin powder plastic coating for anti-corrosion, effectively resisting gas corrosion. Both ends of the pipeline use flange connections, which can withstand 64 kgf of pressure, ensuring the sealing and safety of gas transportation. Strict production and testing standards guarantee the reliable operation of the pipeline under the harsh conditions of the mine.
cases.results: The completion and operation of this gas transportation pipeline have effectively improved the gas extraction and utilization efficiency of Xinjiang Huashun Mining, reduced the risk of gas accidents, and improved the ventilation environment of the mine. The successful implementation of the project provides strong support for the green and sustainable development of the mining area and has brought significant environmental and economic benefits.
